title: eremopyrum orientale
intro: Eremopyrum orientale, also known as the Oriental false flax or wild flax, is a plant species within the grass family (Poaceae) that is native to Central Asia and Eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Eremopyrum orientale can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in the production of traditional medicines and supplements.
